name: sql-pro
description: Master modern SQL with cloud-native databases, OLTP/OLAP
capabilities: Optimize complex SQL queries for billion-row datasets in cloud data warehouses
Design database schemas for multi-tenant SaaS applications with compliance requirements
Create real-time analytical queries with minimal latency for dashboards
Implement data migration strategies between Oracle and cloud-native PostgreSQL
Build cohort analysis and customer retention tracking queries
Design HTAP systems handling both transactions and analytics efficiently
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill containing SQL expertise and guidance. Static analysis scanned 0 files with 0 lines of executable code. No security risks detected as the skill provides only conversational SQL guidance without any code execution capabilities.
valueStatement: Complex database queries and performance issues slow down applications and frustrate developers. This skill delivers expert SQL optimization, advanced query techniques, and database architecture guidance for modern cloud-native systems.
userTitle: Master SQL queries and database optimization
limitations: Cannot directly execute queries or access your database systems
Requires you to provide schema details and query plans for optimization
Recommendations are based on best practices and may need testing in your environment
Does not replace database administrators for production system changes

useCases.targetUser: Backend engineers managing high-volume transactional databases
useCases.title: E-commerce Platform Optimization
useCases.description: Optimize database performance for high-traffic online stores with complex product catalogs and order processing.

useCases.targetUser: Data analysts and BI developers working with Snowflake or BigQuery
useCases.title: Data Warehouse Analytics
useCases.description: Design efficient analytical queries for business intelligence dashboards and reporting systems.

useCases.targetUser: Full-stack developers building cloud-native SaaS applications
useCases.title: SaaS Database Architecture
useCases.description: Build scalable multi-tenant database schemas with proper isolation and GDPR compliance.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Query Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this SQL query for correctness and suggest improvements: [paste your query]. The table schema is: [describe schema]. Expected output: [describe what you need].
promptTemplates.scenario: Beginner - Getting feedback on a working query

promptTemplates.title: Performance Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: This query takes too long on a table with [row count] rows. Current execution time: [time]. EXPLAIN plan shows: [paste plan]. Optimize for faster execution while maintaining correctness.

promptTemplates.title: Schema Design Consultation
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a database schema for [application type] with these requirements: [list requirements]. Must support [scale expectations] and comply with [regulations]. Include indexing strategy.

promptTemplates.title: Migration Strategy Planning
promptTemplates.prompt: Plan a migration from [source database] to [target database] for a [size] database with [key constraints]. Include: schema conversion, data migration approach, downtime minimization, and rollback plan.

bestPractices: Always use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities
Test query performance with realistic data volumes before deploying to production
Document complex queries with comments explaining business logic and assumptions
antiPatterns: Running untested complex queries directly on production databases without backups
Using SELECT * instead of specifying required columns in production code
Ignoring EXPLAIN plans and relying on intuition for query optimization

faq.question: Can this skill execute SQL queries on my database?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides expert guidance and query optimization recommendations. You must execute queries yourself in your database environment.

faq.question: Which SQL databases does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill covers PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, and other modern SQL databases including cloud-native and HTAP systems.

faq.question: How do I provide context for query optimization?
faq.answer: Share your query, table schemas with row counts, current execution time, and the EXPLAIN plan. More context enables more accurate optimization recommendations.

faq.question: Can this skill help with NoSQL databases?
faq.answer: Primary focus is SQL databases. For NoSQL systems with SQL interfaces like MongoDB or Cassandra, guidance is available for their SQL query capabilities.

faq.question: Is the advice safe to run on production databases?
faq.answer: Always test recommendations in a staging environment first. The skill provides best-practice guidance but cannot account for all production-specific constraints.

faq.question: Does this skill help with database security?
faq.answer: Yes, it covers SQL injection prevention, row-level security, data masking, audit trails, and compliance patterns for GDPR and other regulations.
